$comment: Tool manifest for the Hermes Agent sandbox to drive the Aegis CFO on-demand procurement flow over HTTP. Endpoints are served by app/routes/hermes_api.py. The flow is stateful: call procurement_intake first to get a request_id, then pass it to the later tools. Point base_url at the Aegis CFO app reachable from inside the sandbox (host gateway IP or tunnel). If HERMES_TOOL_TOKEN is set in Aegis CFO, send it as a bearer token via AEGIS_TOOL_TOKEN.

tools.name: procurement_intake
tools.description: INTAKE: parse a natural-language need ('I want to buy A') into a requirement spec and create a procurement request. Returns request_id + requirement_spec. Call this first.

tools.name: procurement_discover
tools.description: DISCOVER: find candidate vendors/products for the request (digital services or physical goods, per the need and its category) and add them to the scorecard. mode 'seed' (curated, default) or 'live'.

tools.name: procurement_enrich
tools.description: ENRICH: compute 0-100 scores (price/time/risk/quality/terms) for each candidate and disqualify any missing a must-have. Returns the scored vendors + a summary.

tools.name: procurement_recommend
tools.description: EVALUATE: rank the qualified candidates and write a comparative recommendation. Returns the recommended vendor + narrative.

tools.name: procurement_negotiate
tools.description: NEGOTIATE (optional): run agent-vs-agent negotiation against the recommended (or chosen) vendor. Returns the agreed price, savings and transcript.

vendor_id.description: Optional; defaults to the recommended vendor.

tools.name: procurement_guardrail
tools.description: GUARDRAIL: send the chosen purchase (negotiated amount if any) through the deterministic spend gate. Returns ALLOW / NEEDS_APPROVAL / BLOCK. The agent cannot self-approve; over-threshold spend routes to the human queue.

tools.name: procurement_get
tools.description: Fetch the full current state of a procurement request (spec, vendors, scores, recommendation, negotiation, approval).

tools.name: procurement_run
tools.description: Run the whole pipeline in one call: intake -> discover -> enrich -> recommend -> negotiate -> guardrail. Returns the consolidated request state. Use to confirm your step-by-step synthesis matches the engine.
